reason: 2001: A Space Odyssey evokes profound awe at endless cosmic vistas
Cinema Paradiso offers a tender, nostalgic meditation on film and memory
Wings of Desire marvels at everyday moments with poetic wonder
Three Colors: Blue dwells in quiet beauty and emotional depth
Three Colors: Red finds lyrical resonance in small human acts
Fantasia turns music into a sublime, dreamlike spectacle
The Wizard of Oz captures childlike wonder in a vibrant fantasy world
E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial brings heartfelt wonder to the ordinary
Lawrence of Arabia expands the desert into an epic canvas of awe
Dances with Wolves reveals the plains as a place of serene beauty
